indicators.name: large dining table
indicators.rationale: The dining table is too large for a single person to comfortably use as a workspace.

indicators.name: white chairs
indicators.rationale: The white chairs are not designed for extended computer use and lack ergonomic support.

indicators.name: lack of personal flat work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height suitable for placing a laptop or keyboard.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: The chairs do not provide proper back support or armrests for extended use.

indicators.name: no dedicated lighting for screen work
indicators.rationale: The ambient lighting is not sufficient for tasks requiring focused screen work.

indicators.name: no dedicated layout for solo work
indicators.rationale: The room is not set up for solo work, with multiple chairs and a large table suggesting a communal setting.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for solo computer work due to the lack of a dedicated flat work surface, ergonomic seating, and appropriate lighting. The large dining table and white chairs suggest a communal setting rather than a dedicated workspace for solo work.
